features.description: Nested .claude/ agent/workflow/output-style closest to working directory now wins on name collision.
features.reference_changelog_line: Nested `.claude/` directories: the agent, workflow, and output-style closest to the working directory now wins when names collide; project-scope workflow saves now target the closest existing `.claude/workflows/`

features.description: Auto mode now evaluates subagent spawns through the classifier before launch, closing a permission bypass gap.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved auto mode: subagent spawns are now evaluated by the classifier before launch, closing a gap where a subagent could request a blocked action without review

features.description: Workflow prompt keyword now triggers only on explicit phrases like 'run a workflow' or 'workflow:', not any mention.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed the workflow prompt keyword to use a purple shimmer highlight and trigger only on explicit phrases like "run a workflow" or "workflow:", not on any mention of the word

features.description: /bug now requires a description before submitting and no longer uses model-refusal text as the issue title.
features.reference_changelog_line: `/bug` now requires a description before submitting, and no longer uses model-refusal text as the GitHub issue title

features.description: MCP server-level specs in subagent disallowedTools are now honored instead of being silently ignored (permission bypass
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed MCP server-level specs (`mcp__server`, `mcp__server__*`, `mcp__*`) in subagent `disallowedTools` being silently ignored

features.description: New Tool(param:value) permission syntax with wildcard support, e.g. Agent(model:opus) to block Opus subagents.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `Tool(param:value)` syntax for permission rules to match a tool's input parameters (with `*` wildcard), e.g. `Agent(model:opus)` to block Opus subagents

features.description: Nested .claude/skills now load contextually with <dir>:<name> qualifier on name clash to keep both available.
features.reference_changelog_line: Skills in nested `.claude/skills` directories now load when working on files there; on a name clash, the nested skill appears as `<dir>:<name>` so both stay available

features.description: Skill listing truncation warning now reports how many skill descriptions are affected.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved the skill listing truncation warning to show how many skill descriptions are affected
